attachments.title: 【SONG REVIEW AND CHAT】雑談 Thanks for 100k subs! Let's talk- My New Song! feat. Bird (Kiara Takanashi)
attachments.description: What is up, humans?! ♡ Calliope Mori（森 カリオペ）here. Thank you eternally for 100,000 YouTube subscriptions! Let's "kick off" this EP Premiere event with a chat ...
